title: The Last Ship
full_description: This powerful musical tells the story of a tight-knit community fighting the decline of the shipbuilding industry in Wallsend — Sting's hometown. With stirring music spanning raw folk and rousing choruses to intimate ballads, Sting himself performs one of the lead roles. A visceral and human musical drama about transformation and resilience in a changing world.
ai_summary: Sting's deeply personal musical about the closure of the shipbuilding industry in his hometown of Wallsend, with Sting himself playing Jackie White, the ailing foreman. The world premiere of the renewed version at Theater Carré, January 2026.
